200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

With each attack, blesses the ally with the lowest health. The efficiency of all healing received by the unit is increased by 20%.

description 4/6

With each attack, the ally with the lowest health is blessed. The efficiency of all healing received by the unit is increased by 27%. Two additional allies are healed for 30% of the healing received by the blessed fighter.

description 6/6

Each attack blesses the ally with the lowest health for 1,9 sec and restores 10000 health to that ally. The efficiency of this ally’s healing is increased by 35%. Additionally, 35% of healing received by the blessed unit restores health to two more allies. Damage done by the blessed unit is increased by 275%. The unit also becomes immune to stun, freeze, mind control, silence, and fear.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When attacking, the Priest’s spell power is increased by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 8 effects.

description 4/6

When attacking, the Priest’s spell power is increased by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 8 effects. When attacking, the spell power of 2 nearby mages is increased by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 8 effects.

description 6/6

When attacking, the Priest’s spell power is increased by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 8 effects. When attacking, the spell power of 2 nearby mages is increased by 10% for 10 sec. Up to 8 effects. The Priest’s attack speed is increased by 50% and the Priest’s healing is increased by 200% for the duration of the battle.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

All healing receibved by the Priest and all healing applied by the Priest is increased by 60% for the duration of the battle.

description 4/6

All healing receibved by the Priest and all healing applied by the Priest is increased by 60% for the duration of the battle. Additional healing from the Priest’s ability is applied to the Priest himself.

description 6/6

All healing receibved by the Priest and all healing applied by the Priest is increased by 60% for the duration of the battle. Additional healing from the Priest’s ability is applied to the Priest himself. Once in a while, the Priest resurrects a random ally with 50% health.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Every second Priest restores 2% of their max health to themself and all allies in a small radius.

description 4/6

Every second Priest restores 2% of their max health to themself and all allies in a small radius. Once in a while, increases the max health of the ally with the least max health by 40% for 6 sec.

description 6/6

Every second Priest restores 2% of their max health to themself and all allies in a small radius. Once in a while, increases the max health of the ally with the least max health by 40% for 6 sec. When the Priest restores health to himself or an ally, the Priest has a 25% chance to remove a random negative effect from the target.

Materials

Magic Mushrooms
Starlight

Dungeon chest

purchase in:
Gem Bay chest

purchase in:
Arena battle

purchase in:
Portal chest for dark souls
